# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

default:
  image: python:3.12
  cache:
    key: "pip-${CI_PROJECT_NAME}"
    paths:
      - .cache/pip
  variables:
    PIP_CACHE_DIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip"
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK: "1"
    PIP_NO_PYTHON_VERSION_WARNING: "1"
    PIP_ROOT_USER_ACTION: "ignore"

.install_deps: &install_deps
  - python -V
  - python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
  - |
    if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
      python -m pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps
    fi
  - |
    if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then
      python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt --no-deps
    fi
  - |
    if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
      python -m pip install . --no-deps
    fi

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - *install_deps
    - |
      if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.cfg ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then
        python -m pip install pytest --no-deps
        pytest -q
      else
        echo "No Python project metadata found; skipping tests."
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 1 week
    reports:
      junit: junit.xml
  allow_failure: false

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - *install_deps
    - python -m pip install build twine --no-deps
    - python -m build
    - python -m twine check dist/*
  artifacts:
    expire_in: 2 weeks
    paths:
      - dist/

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
  script:
    - *install_deps
    - echo "Deploy step placeholder. Add your deployment commands here."
